case_title: HARRIS, GORDON et al VS CANFIELD, CATHERINE DBA AUSTIN DESIGN

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR REHEARING ON APPEAL FILED.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO CANFIELD, CATHERINE D/B/A AUSTIN DESIGNS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIS, GORDON ELMAN, JUDI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANFIELD, CATHERINE DBA AUSTIN DESIGN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,077.00, PLAINTIFFS ORDERED TO RETURN SUBJECT SOFA TO DEFENDANT, FORTHWITH, CARTAGE, DELIVERY AND FREIGHT CHARGES PAID BY PLAINTIFFS. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT THE SAID SOFA BE DELIVERED NOT LATER THAN 21 CALENDER DAYS FROM THE DATE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS AMENDED JUDGMENT TO 130 LEWIS ROAD, SAN JOSE, CA 95111, IN THE SAME STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
